full_text:
Du Xi (Zixu) 杜襲 (子緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Xi (杜襲), styledZixu (子緒), was born in Yingchuan. Proposed to the troops that Zhang He take command after Xiahou Yuan was killed. Du Xi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Du Xi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
